# LYFTIUM - AI Automation for Retail, Manufacturing & Professional Services

LYFTIUM builds AI learning loop systems and agentic AI solutions for small businesses in retail, manufacturing, and professional services. Our systems compound institutional knowledge, cut costs by 25%, and automate workflows 3x faster.

## Core Services

### Learning Loop Systems
AI that learns from your business data and improves over time, compounding your institutional knowledge. These systems continuously optimize based on real-world performance data.

### Agentic AI Solutions
Autonomous AI agents that handle complex workflows 24/7, freeing your team for high-value work. Our agents can automate customer service, order processing, inventory management, and more.

### Model-Agnostic Platform
Future-proof systems that work across different AI models, protecting you from vendor lock-in. Switch between models as technology evolves without rebuilding your infrastructure.

### Enterprise AI Resilience
Systems resilient to model changes and market disruptions, ensuring business continuity. Build AI systems that adapt and maintain performance through changing conditions.

## Target Industries

- **Retail & E-commerce**: Inventory optimization, customer personalization, automated customer support
- **Manufacturing**: Predictive maintenance, quality control automation, supply chain optimization
- **Professional Services**: Document automation, client communication, workflow optimization

## Key Benefits

- Cut operational costs by 25%
- Automate workflows 3x faster
- 90% time savings on repetitive tasks
- 70% cost reduction in operations
- 4x faster response times

## Pricing

- **Starter**: $997/project - Single automation project, 2-week implementation
- **Growth**: $2,497/month - Multiple automations, ongoing optimization, priority support
